phrases.text_local: Onde fica o posto de abastecimento de combustível?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW POHSH-too DIH uh-buhsh-teh-see-MAYNG-too DIH koom-boosh-TEE-vehl?

likely_response.local: Pergunte no balcão de informações da marina; eles indicam o local exato.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih NOO bahl-KOWN DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH DUH muh-REE-nuh; EH-lihsh een-DEE-kuhng AW loo-KAHL eh-ZAH-too.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask at the marina information desk; they can tell you the exact location.

responses.english: Ask at the marina information desk; they can tell you the exact location.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih NOO bahl-KOWN DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH DUH muh-REE-nuh; EH-lihsh een-DEE-kuhng AW loo-KAHL eh-ZAH-too.
responses.french: Pergunte no balcão de informações da marina; eles indicam o local exato.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica a Doca de Recreio?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH DAW-kuh DIH rehk-RAYOO?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Doca de Recreio.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH DAW-kuh DIH rehk-RAYOO.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Recreational Dock.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Recreational Dock.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH DAW-kuh DIH rehk-RAYOO.
responses.french: Siga as placas para a Doca de Recreio.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where Doca de Recreio is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a Doca de Recreio?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH DAW-kuh DIH rehk-RAYOO?
phrases.cultural_note: Doca de Recreio is the recreational dock area, a key part of the marina.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, fica na Marina de Faro.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, FEE-kuh NUH muh-REE-nuh DIH FAH-roo.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, it's at Faro Marina.

responses.english: Good morning, it's at Faro Marina.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, FEE-kuh NUH muh-REE-nuh DIH FAH-roo.
responses.french: Bom dia, fica na Marina de Faro.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica o início do Pontão da Marina?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW ee-NEES-yoo DOO poong-TOWN DUH muh-REE-nuh?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Pontão da Marina.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW poong-TOWN DUH muh-REE-nuh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Marina Pier.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Marina Pier.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW poong-TOWN DUH muh-REE-nuh.
responses.french: Siga as placas para o Pontão da Marina.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where Ria Formosa boat tours board
phrases.text_local: Onde é que embarcam os passeios de barco à Ria Formosa?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih EH KIH aym-BAH-ruh-kuhng OOSH puh-SAYOOSH DIH BAH-ruh-koo AH REEUH foo-ruh-MAW-zuh?
phrases.cultural_note: Staff prioritize brevity due to peak season crowds.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, embarque no pontão da Marina.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, aym-BAH-ruh-kih NOO poong-TOWN DUH muh-REE-nuh.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, board at the Marina pier.

responses.english: Good morning, board at the Marina pier.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, aym-BAH-ruh-kih NOO poong-TOWN DUH muh-REE-nuh.
responses.french: Bom dia, embarque no pontão da Marina.
